message:
feat(engine): add lockstep runner default runtime specs fallback and improve CLI tests

- franken_lockstep_runner.rs: Fall back to DEFAULT_LOCKSTEP_RUNTIME_SPECS_PATH
  when neither --engine-specs nor --runtime-specs is passed, enabling
  zero-arg invocation from the repo root.
- franken_lockstep_runner_cli.rs: Add temp_dir() helper and new test
  `lockstep_runner_loads_default_runtime_specs_when_present` that verifies
  automatic discovery.  Fix runtime adapter commands from `cat >/dev/null;
  echo ...` to plain `echo ...` since stdin piping is not used.  Pass
  --engine-specs explicitly in the replay-command test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
